productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Astar Salvation 3 White Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those want a shoe to support their foot and make sure they are getting the best performance during those healthy morning runs, the AdiStar Salvation 3 combines lightweight comfort and ease of wear that makes running all the more pleasurable. adidas have used their own Formotion technology which means your shoe will adapt to the ground every step of the way. Upper Suede and mesh upper for maximum breathable comfort and style adidas Patented 3-Stripes in reflective silver plus reflective features on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and style Meshed and padded collar and tongue with fabric inner for all-day snug comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit OrthoLite® performance insoles giving 'comfort from the inside out' that can be replaced with a medical orthotic Insole wicks away moisture, inhibits odour and fungus and ensures air flow to keep your feet cool Midsole AdiPrene midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protection Heel stabilizer in the heel for absolute impact protection for the backfoot and ankles TORSION midfoot Outsole Durable Continental rubber outsole with flex grooves and lugs for absolute grip and traction Formotion heel for total shock absorption and support 3D Pro-Moderator on inner side to counterbalance over-pronation miCoach Compatible Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
